Bash(# Check Horizon completed/failed jobs
curl -s http://localhost:8080/horizon/api/stats 2>&1 | python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('Jobs per minute:', d.get\('jobsPerMinute'\)\); print\('Recent completed:', d.get\('recentlyCompleted', d.get\('completedJobs','N/A'\)\)\); print\('Recent failed:', d.get\('recentlyFailed', d.get\('failedJobs','N/A'\)\)\); print\('Status:', d.get\('status'\)\); print\('Processes:', d.get\('processes'\)\)" 2>&1)
